---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-16"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)


```


```{r}

df <- read_csv(here("data", "headstate_constituency_combined.csv"))


df <- df %>% 
  mutate(mean_percent = mean * 100)



write.csv(df, here("output", "headstate_constituency.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
